notes: Jira Cloud for Slack issue notifications. Serialize an example's `blocks` array into an action's `text` field. Issue card = header + a section with a linked issue key/summary + section(fields) for Status/Assignee/Priority/Sprint (or a status-transition string like 'In Progress → Ready for QA') + a context footer with project/points/epic. Includes a richer Epic card with an inline checklist section (uses :white_check_mark:/:red_circle: emoji) for go-live/readiness gates. Fits dev/project/ops channels.

examples.name: issue_created
examples.when: A ticket is opened (e.g., a follow-up fix after an incident).

text.text: *Summary:* Enable Kinesis on-demand capacity mode for `mspf-telemetry-ingest` and rework consumer Lambda reserved concurrency (permanent fix for incident INC-7742).

elements.text: Reporter: carlos_gonzalez · Assignee: Unassigned · Sprint: SRE 26.14 · Labels: reliability, kinesis, lambda

examples.name: issue_transitioned
examples.when: An issue changes status (e.g., moves to Ready for QA).

text.text: ONETECH-1487 moved to Ready for QA
*<https://toyota.atlassian.net/browse/ONETECH-1487|ONETECH-1487>*  Harden secrets rotation in platform-core auth module

examples.name: epic_with_checklist
examples.when: An epic/readiness gate summary with an inline checklist (go-live cutover, release gate).

text.text: *<https://toyota.atlassian.net/browse/TBMNC-1420|TBMNC-1420 · Opcenter MES Go-Live Readiness — Cutover Gate>*

*Cutover checklist — 7 of 8 complete*
:white_check_mark: Discrete — station routing + WIP tracking
:white_check_mark: Foundation — master data + user roles
:white_check_mark: Quality — SPC + defect genealogy
:white_check_mark: Logistics — kanban / material flow to ERP
:white_check_mark: PLC + SCADA device layer connected
:white_check_mark: Nexus / Ignition tags mapped (14 lines)
:white_check_mark: Cutover runbook + rollback signed off
:red_circle: Prod DB access — pending approval
